activated_rules.rule_name: Consignor verification via explicit mention in invoice
EU origin normalization and additional EU member states accepted in invoice

consignor.certificate_value:
Cellmark AB
Box 11927
SE404 39, GÖTEBORG
Sweden
consignor.invoice_value:
CellMark AB
Lilla Bommen 3C·Box 11927
SE-404 39 Gothenburg·Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Cellmark AB' after normalization (case, spacing, legal form) matches 'CellMark AB' in invoice. The address matches in city and postal code with minor acceptable formatting differences. The country Sweden matches exactly. The consignor name is explicitly found in the invoice header and company details, fulfilling the rule 4.1.0 for identification.

consignee.certificate_value:
EXPRESS PACK PRINT FZE
JEBEL ALI FREE ZONE
P.O. BOX 16797
PLOT NO EWTA - 28
DUBAI
UNITED ARAB EMIRATES
consignee.invoice_value:
EXPRESS PACK PRINT FZE
JEBEL ALI FREE ZONE
P.O. BOX 16797 ,PLOT NO EWTA - 28
DUBAI
UNITED ARAB EMIRATES
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'EXPRESS PACK PRINT FZE' matches exactly in both certificate and invoice at the buyer field. Address details including P.O. Box and Dubai, United Arab Emirates, match exactly. Land corresponds and the consignee is unambiguously identified in invoice's buyer field per priority rules.

goods_description.certificate_value:
BROWN KRAFTLINER
FSC CONTROLLED WOOD CERTIFICATE NO DNV-CW-001902
HS CODE: 480411
goods_description.invoice_value: BROWN KRAFTLINER FSC CONTROLLED WOOD CERTIFICATE NO DNV-CW-001902 HS Code: 480411
goods_description.motivation: Goods description in certificate 'BROWN KRAFTLINER FSC CONTROLLED WOOD CERTIFICATE NO DNV-CW-001902 HS CODE: 480411' can be exactly identified in invoice lines in same form. No article numbers specified so verification done by exact text matching, fulfilling rule 4.3.

quantity.motivation: Quantity 160,987 MT gross/net weight in certificate matches the 160.987 MT Gross/Net Weight total in invoice after normalization of decimal comma to decimal point and removal of thousands separator. The total number of 59 reels also matches in both documents. The units and quantity concept are consistent.

origin.invoice_value:
MADE IN AUSTRIA
WE CERTIFY THAT THIS INVOICE IS TRUE AND CORRECT AND THAT THE GOODS ARE OF AUSTRIA ORIGIN
origin.motivation: Certificate states 'European Union' and specifically 'Austria' as origin. Invoice explicitly states goods are of Austria origin and 'MADE IN AUSTRIA'. According to EU origin normalization rules, this is acceptable and the origin matches.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All applicable control points (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, and origin) match between certificate and invoice after allowed normalization. There are no mismatches or manual review triggers.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer mellan certifikat och faktura. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
